R2-action-signature.intent: Action method does not take exactly one object parameter and return an object.

R3-query-signature.intent: Query method does not return an array.

R4-placement-naming.intent: Concept file default export name does not match placement.

R5-protected-path.intent: Protected path write target for GatePolicy tests.

R6-spec-presence.intent: Concept spec exists but is missing required sections.

R7-test-presence.intent: Concept implementation is missing its sibling test.

R8-surface-coverage.intent: Concept tests instantiate without track(), so runtime coverage is absent.

R9-sync-test-shape.intent: Sync test lacks required setupSyncTest positive and negative shape.

R10-legible-tests.intent: Multi-action/principle-style concept test lacks trace() or console.log narration.
